file_insights.purpose: Defines sync status bar component with three visual states
key_elements: expandedContainer LinearLayout with status text and progress bar
collapsedDot View for minimal online state
Three states: offline (amber), syncing (blue with progress), online (green dot)

patterns_discovered.description: Three distinct visual states managed via android:visibility attributes on different containers
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows single layout to represent multiple UI states without runtime View replacement

patterns_discovered.description: Uses merge root element for composing reusable layout component
patterns_discovered.benefit: Avoids unnecessary ViewGroup nesting when included in parent layouts

patterns_discovered.description: TextView uses layout_weight=1 in LinearLayout for dynamic space allocation
patterns_discovered.benefit: Responsive text sizing with automatic ellipsize fallback

patterns_discovered.description: tools:background and tools:visibility used for Android Studio previewing
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows design-time visualization without affecting runtime behavior

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Merge root requires proper parent layout handling
gotchas_discovered.explanation: Merge root doesn't define layout dimensions - children must be compatible with including parent
gotchas_discovered.impact: Parent layout must provide context for child sizing

gotchas_discovered.explanation: Using indeterminate=true with fixed dimensions requires proper style configuration
gotchas_discovered.impact: May need custom ProgressBar styling for consistent appearance across API levels

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Color resources must be defined externally
gotchas_discovered.explanation: Layout references @color/sync_offline_amber and @color/sync_online_green without definitions in this file
gotchas_discovered.impact: Build will fail if color resources not defined in colors.xml

gotchas_discovered.explanation: Small View dimensions may be difficult to tap/interact with on some devices
gotchas_discovered.impact: Consider larger touch target if dot needs to be interactive

approach_details.strategy: Created comprehensive layout file with well-documented structure supporting three distinct UI states
approach_details.execution: Single successful attempt - file created with proper XML structure, comments, and Android best practices
approach_details.quality: High - includes detailed comments explaining states, components, and visual behavior

recommendations.suggestion: Define color resources (sync_offline_amber, sync_online_green, sync_syncing_blue) in colors.xml to prevent build failures
Add android:contentDescription attributes to collapsedDot and statusText views for screen reader support
Consider increasing collapsedDot hit target size or making it interactive with surrounding padding for better UX
Coordinate with Kotlin implementation to add state transition animations between offline/syncing/online states
Document the expected textSize, colors, and padding values in developer documentation for consistency with design system
